title: Up to 32%: All-day Spa Admission for One or Two at King Spa Chicago

pricing_options.name: General Spa Admission Plus Base Room Access for One
General Spa Admission Plus Base Room Access for Two

highlights: Access to 9 sauna roomsmade from crystals, salt, stone, and wood to detox and refresh!
Thermal pools & wet roomsto soothe muscles in healing hot & cold hydrotherapy baths.
Complimentary spa amenities– showers, robes, and lockers included!

Exclusive Access to Base Rock Room - One of only three in the world!Melt into Siraka mineral stones, with amethyst & coal therapy.(Don't forget to select it!)
Perfect for Gifting!Treat someone special to the ultimate day of relaxation!
fine_print: Children under 18 must be accompanied by an adult.
Hours and last entry: See current hours and last-entry time on King Spa’s website before visiting.
Admission is first-come, first-served and subject to building capacity.
Weekends/holidays (approx. 11 a.m.–5 p.m.) are busiest; waits or denial of entry may occur.
Tip: Arrive early or visit on weekdays to avoid lines.
Admission does not include massage, facial, or body scrub services; they are available for an additional fee.
All goods or services must be used by the same person.

faqs.question: What should first-timers bring to King Spa Chicago?
faqs.answer: Visitors recommend bringing a hair clip or tie, facial cleanser, and moisturizer to enhance the experience. A fresh uniform is provided upon entry, and the facility supplies basic amenities, but personal skincare products help maximize the benefits of the sauna treatments. Several reviewers noted that bringing these items allowed them to better care for their skin after sweating in the various sauna rooms.

faqs.question: How long can you stay at King Spa Chicago?
faqs.answer: The all-day admission ticket allows visitors to stay for the entire operating day. Multiple reviewers reported spending 5 to 7 hours comfortably exploring the facilities, with some noting they wished they had arrived earlier to maximize their time. The facility also offers overnight sleeping accommodations at an additional cost for those seeking an extended experience.

faqs.question: Is the atmosphere at King Spa Chicago quiet and peaceful?
faqs.answer: King Spa maintains a quiet, peaceful environment as a core value, with staff actively enforcing silence rules. Most visitors praise the serene atmosphere and respectful clientele. A few recent reviewers noted occasional noise from doors or other guests, though they acknowledged this was the exception rather than the norm and did not significantly detract from their overall relaxation.

faqs.question: What is included in King Spa Chicago's all-day admission?
faqs.answer: All-day admission includes access to hot and cold tubs, multiple themed sauna rooms, relaxation areas, a movie theater, and napping spaces. Additional services such as body scrubs, massages, and facials are available at extra cost. Visitors consistently describe the variety of sauna rooms and amenities as extensive, with multiple reviewers noting they easily spent a full day exploring different spaces without feeling rushed.

reviews.text: This place is amazing , the only complaint about it, its about the sauna. They only allowed you nacked and I don't like that. I think they need to consider this rule
reviews.author: Yesika

reviews.text: I had never been here before, I asked a lot of questions, and they took the time to answer all of them for me, and I didn’t feel uncomfortable asking. I purchased the CBD 90 minutes massage. (It was amazing) The massage therapist checked in with me many times to make that everything was perfect. I hope to make this a monthly visit. Read More
